parameter.description: Temperature of Telescope Baffle Assembly, S1, alternative control

parameter.description: Temperature of the Star Tracking Sensor Assembly, LHP 15

parameter.description: Temperature of the SWIR-A Pulse Tube Cooler

parameter.description: Temperature of the SWIR-A Compressor

parameter.description: Temperature of the SWIR-A Front-end Electronics

parameter.description: Temperature of the SWIR-B Front-end Electronics

parameter.description: Temperature of the VNIR Thermal Electronic Control

parameter.name: TCS_VNIR_FEE_T
parameter.description: Temperature of the VNIR Front-end Electronics

parameter.description: Temperature SWIR Focal Plane Assembly, Sensor 2

parameter.description: Temperature of the SWIR Proximity Electronics

parameter.description: Temperature SWIR Reference

parameter.description: Temperature of the Telescope Assembly, Mirror 1

parameter.description: Temperature of the OBCA LED on the sphere's surface

parameter.description: Temperature of the OBCA halogen lamps on the sphere's surface

parameter.description: Temperature of the SCM failsafe mechanism

parameter.description: Temperature of the VNIR Front-end Electronics, LHP 8 - cavity

parameter.description: Temperature of the On-Board Calibration Assembly, LHP 9 - cavity

parameter.name: TCS_STSA_Cav_T

parameter.name: TCS_VNIR_FEE2_Cav_T
parameter.description: Temperature of the VNIR Front-end Electronics, Cavity, LHP 10

parameter.description: Temperature Sensor of SSM OTA (FSM)

parameter.name: TCS_TBA_T
parameter.description: Temperature Control of the Telescope Baffle Assembly

parameter.name: TCS_WinA_T
parameter.description: Temperature of the SWIR-A detector window

parameter.name: TCS_WinB_T
parameter.description: Temperature of the SWIR-B detector window

parameter.name: TCS_CCE_T
parameter.description: Minimum temperature of the SWIR Cooler Control Electronics

parameter.name: TCS_VNIR_LED_T
parameter.description: Temperature control of the VNIR Focal Plane LED

parameter.name: TCS_SWIRA_LED_T
parameter.description: Temperature control of the SWIR-A Focal Plane LED

parameter.description: Temperature control of the SWIR-B Focal Plane LED

parameter.name: TCS_TBA_S3_T
parameter.description: Temperature of Telescope Baffle Assembly, S3, alternative control

parameter.name: IPU_Int_01_T
parameter.description: Internal IPU temperature 1

parameter.name: IPU_Int_02_T
parameter.description: Internal IPU temperature 2

parameter.name: CCS_01_I
parameter.description: Current of Constant Current Source 1

parameter.name: CCS_02_I
parameter.description: Current of Constant Current Source 2

parameter.name: CCS_01_V
parameter.description: Voltage of Constant Current Source 1

parameter.name: CCS_02_V
parameter.description: Voltage of Constant Current Source 2

parameter.name: CCS_Lamp_Rad_1_V
parameter.description: Voltage drop across the nominal radiometric lamp 1

parameter.name: CCS_Lamp_Rad_2_V
parameter.description: Voltage drop across the spare radiometric lamp 2

parameter.name: CCS_LED_OBCA_V
parameter.description: Voltage drop across the OBCA LED

parameter.name: CCS_Lamp_Spc_1_V
parameter.description: Voltage drop across the nominal spectral lamp 1

parameter.name: CCS_Lamp_Spc_2_V
parameter.description: Voltage drop across the spare spectral lamp 2

parameter.name: CCS_LED_SWIRA_V
parameter.description: Voltage drop across the LED for nominal SWIR

parameter.name: CCS_LED_SWIRB_V
parameter.description: Voltage drop across the LED for redundant SWIR

parameter.name: CCS_LED_VNIR_V
parameter.description: Voltage drop across the VNIR detector LED

parameter.name: TCS_Inhibit_Health_A
parameter.description: Health indication array of cavity heaters

parameter.name: TCS_Sensor_Health_A
parameter.description: Sensor health indication array

parameter.name: IPU_Status_8_A
parameter.description: Status of OTA level 2

merge.format: binary, unit: absolute value of surface reflectance
